name: WpfBoltCatalogSize
summary: The WPFBoltCatalogSize class represents a control to select the bolt size using the bolt catalog. Bolt catalog controls always need to be in pairs, meaning in every dialog there has to be a WpfBoltCatalogStandard and a WpfBoltCatalogSize control.

constructors.name: WpfBoltCatalogSize
constructors.summary: Initiates a new instance of the control.
